description_long: This object is a large, single-edged sword with a broad, angular blade that features a pronounced curve and a pointed tip. The blade has a metallic, slightly reflective surface with a subtle gradient, suggesting it is made of steel or a similar metal. The handle is straight, rectangular, and appears to be constructed from a darker, matte material, possibly metal or a synthetic composite, with a squared pommel at the end. A simple, flat crossguard separates the blade from the handle, providing basic hand protection. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible decorative elements or engravings, emphasizing function over form. The proportions and robust construction suggest it is intended for heavy-duty use rather than ceremonial display.
description: A large, angular, single-edged sword with a broad metallic blade and a straight, dark handle separated by a simple crossguard. The design is functional and robust, lacking ornamentation.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the sword, highlighting the curved blade and straight handle with a squared pommel.
description_view_1: Edge-on view displaying the thinness of the blade and handle, with minimal visible detail except the outline.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the blade's curve and the handle's rectangular shape.
description_view_3: Edge-on view from the opposite side of view 1, again emphasizing the slim profile of the blade and handle.
attribute_handle_design: straight, rectangular, dark, squared pommel, no visible grip texture
